clEntries.7.5.25: v7.5.24: Gate Opener, Flow Triggers, Added missing fingerprints across multiple drivers, Updated driver count to 228 with 6713 total fingerprints, Added support for `_TZE284_0ints6wl` soil sensor (TS0601)
clEntries.7.5.24: v7.5.24: . Fix: gate opener DP3 contact sensor (issue #305). Migrated deprecated flow triggers to modern triggerFlowCard helper. Added missing fingerprints.
clEntries.7.5.23: Maintenance release v7.5.23 — . Internal data cleanup and archive of obsolete planning files. No new drivers or fingerprints.
clEntries.7.5.22: Version 7.5.22 — App metadata and store listing update. No new drivers or fingerprints added in this release.
clEntries.7.5.21: v7.5.20: Fixed local socket port reuse for WiFi (TuyAPI) devices, resolving connection drops and repeated reconnections, Resolved diagnostic crashes caused by mixed WiFi/Zigbee protocol handling, Added new device fingerprints across the driver library (3,208 total across 228 drivers), Updated `switch_4gang` driver with new manufacturer fingerprints and capability mappings, Cleanly separated WiFi (
clEntries.7.5.20: v7.5.20: . Fixed WiFi socket port reuse, cleanly separated WiFi/Zigbee protocols, improved 4-gang switch support, and resolved diagnostic crashes.
clEntries.7.5.19: Added Android native Intent magic URL pairing for all 20 WiFi drivers. Updated pairing configuration UI.
clEntries.7.5.18: Easy Login with saved credentials, auto device classification with brand badges, TS110E level control fix, alarm_battery removed from 136 drivers (SDK3 conflict), 7 FP collisions resolved, duplicate flow cards fixed across driver fleet.
clEntries.7.5.17: v7.5.17 — 3,207 new fingerprints, backlight mode alignment fix, and fingerprint case normalization for more reliable pairing.
clEntries.7.5.16: v7.5.16 — . Maintenance release with updated device expectations, diagnostics, and internal state.
